query: I am gluten-free. Make me a chicken pasta dish.
expected_behavior: Recipe MUST replace regular pasta/flour with a gluten-free option (rice/corn/chickpea pasta, GF flour). allergen_checker must flag wheat.
final_answer:
Gluten-Free Chicken Pasta

Ingredients (serves 4)
- 12 oz gluten-free pasta (penne or fettuccine)
- 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breast, cut into bite-size pieces
- 2 tbsp olive oil
- 1 small onion, diced
- 3 cloves garlic, minced
- 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
- 2 cups fresh spinach
- 1/2 cup reserved pasta water
- 1 tbsp lemon juice
- 1 tsp Italian seasoning
- 1/2 tsp salt, plus more for pasta water
- 1/4 tsp black pepper
- 2 tbsp nutritional yeast, optional for a savory finish

Steps
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the gluten-free pasta according to package directions until just tender. Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water, then drain.
2. While the pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the chicken, salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning. Cook for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
4. Add the onion and cook for 2 to 3 minutes until softened.
5. Stir in the garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
6. Add the cherry tomatoes and cook for 2 minutes, just until they begin to soften.
7. Add the spinach and stir until wilted.
8. Add the drained pasta, lemon juice, and reserved pasta water. Toss everything together until lightly sauced.
9. If desired, sprinkle with nutritional yeast and serve warm.

Source URL: https://www.goldenglutenfree.com/gluten-free-chicken-pasta-recipes/

Note: I used a gluten-free recipe structure and removed the broth to keep it gluten-free-safe.
